headline: SNPS Rises 8.2% YTD: Should Investors Hold or Fold the Stock?
summary: Synopsys is riding on the AI-driven demand and gains 8.2% YTD, but Design IP weakness, margin pressure and higher debt raise investor questions.

headline: GlobalFoundries Expands AI Role With ARC IP Deal And Photonics Push
summary: GlobalFoundries (NasdaqGS:GFS) completed the acquisition of Synopsys' ARC Processor IP Solutions business. The company announced a collaboration with Sivers Semiconductors to develop advanced silicon photonics technologies for AI infrastructure. For investors watching chip manufacturing and AI hardware, these moves show how GlobalFoundries is positioning itself across both compute and connectivity. headline: Can GlobalFoundries' ARC Acquisition Strengthen Its Physical AI Push?
summary: GFS boosts its Physical AI push by adding ARC Processor IP, expanding RISC-V offerings, design tools and custom silicon capabilities.

headline: Analysis-Software stocks bounce back - now comes the hard part
summary: Software stocks have rebounded from a punishing selloff as investors are betting that AI may boost the sector rather than leaving it for dead.  Now investors are flocking to firms they see succeeding at integrating AI and adjusting price models by charging clients based on actual usage – while steering clear of firms that are too dependent on traditional pricing, ​which involves subscription fees based on headcount.  "While AI is causing massive disruption, it is remapping the industry rather than destroying it," said Daniel Morgan, portfolio manager at Synovus Trust in Atlanta.
